name: Cefazolin
description: cephalosporin nke ọgbọ mbụ. Ọgwụ nje parenteral nke mbụ maka ọrịa ọnya dị njọ na mgbochi ịwa ahụ. Ezigbo mkpuchi gram-nke gụnyere MSSA. Nye n'ime nkeji 60 nke mbepụ ịwa ahụ maka prophylaxis.
indications: Ọrịa anụ ahụ dị nro dị egwu
Akpụkpọ anụ na akpụkpọ Ọdịdị ọrịa
dose: 1-2g IV/IM q8h. Prophylaxis nke ịwa ahụ: 2g IV n'ime nkeji 60 tupu mbepụ ya. Tinyegharịa 2g ma ọ bụrụ na ịwa ahụ> 4 awa.
window: Maka prophylaxis ịwa ahụ: nye n'ime nkeji 60 nke mbepụ.
contraindications: Ihe nfụkasị nke penicillin siri ike (5-10% cross-reactivity)
warnings: Mmeghachi omume na-aga n'ihu na nrịanrịa penicillin: jiri nlezianya mee ihe na ndị ọrịa na-ahụ nfụkasị penicillin.
Gbanwee dose na nkwarụ gbasara akụrụ.

pediatric.dose: 25-50 mg/kg IV/IM q8h (max 2g/ dose). Prophylaxis: 30 mg / kg (max 2g) tupu mbepụ ya.
pediatric.note: Nchekwa na mụọ nke ọma na pediatrics.

obstetric.note: Nchekwa na ime na lactation. Ọgwụ nje parenteral ahọrọ maka usoro ọmụmụ.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Surgical Prophylaxis
